name: Pneumatic Cane

effects.description: Can deliver a powerful pneumatic strike once per hour (extra 1d4 damage).

description: A sturdy walking cane with a hidden pneumatic piston, capable of delivering a forceful blow. Favored by inventors and secret agents.

artwork.caption: A black cane with a brass handle and subtle seams.

provenance: Inspired by D&D 5e 'Staff of Power', reimagined for science.
